summary: Frontend regression for ForgeSlicer ContextMenu fixes. BOTH previously-CRITICAL bugs are now RESOLVED: (1) Group via ctx menu creates a group (testid 'group-group-<id>' + 'group-toggle-group-<id>' rendered after marquee-select + right-click + ctx-group-btn). (2) Flatten via ctx menu reduces scene count from 2 to 1 in a single atomic setState (no orphans). All other review items verified: marquee Shift+drag, Ctrl+Shift additive marquee, Delete/Backspace multi-delete, Ctrl+D duplicate, Escape clears selection, Delete/Backspace ignored while typing in project-name-input, right-click opens ContextMenu, and marquee hint overlay with correct text.
verified_features: RE-TEST FIX #1 — Group via ContextMenu: VERIFIED. Outliner contains testid 'group-group-<id>' and 'group-toggle-group-<id>' after action.
RE-TEST FIX #2 — Flatten to single mesh: VERIFIED. scene-count 2 objs -> 1 objs, no alert, no console error.
Marquee Shift+drag selects multiple: VERIFIED (2 cubes selected, Duplicate label shows '(2)').
Marquee hint overlay text 'BOX SELECT — drag a rectangle (Ctrl to add)': VERIFIED.
Delete key multi-delete: VERIFIED (4 objs -> 2 objs).
Ctrl+D duplicate of multi-selection: VERIFIED (2 objs -> 4 objs).
Escape clears selection: VERIFIED (Duplicate label drops count).
Delete/Backspace does NOT fire while typing in input: VERIFIED (scene-count preserved, input value mutated normally).
Right-click viewport opens context-menu with ctx-group-btn enabled: VERIFIED.

Right-click outliner row opens same context-menu: NOT FULLY VERIFIED — my script used a non-matching selector 'object-row-*' for outliner items; the implementation appears to use 'outliner-*' or 'group-*' testids. Manual recommendation: confirm via main agent or rerun with correct outliner row testid.
Group -> click member shows whole group: NOT FULLY VERIFIED for same selector reason (could not locate outliner row testid in my script).

Ungroup: NOT FULLY VERIFIED — query for 'group-header-' returned 0 (wrong selector). Group was created (confirmed in TEST 1) and ctx-ungroup-btn was enabled+clickable. Recommend main agent self-test by inspecting outliner DOM after ungroup.
action_items: Both originally-critical bugs are fixed. No blocking action items.

Nice-to-have: document the outliner row + group-header data-testid naming scheme in a comment in Outliner.jsx so future test agents query the right ids (currently 'group-<id>' and 'group-toggle-<id>' for group rows; individual object rows' testid was not found by 'object-row-*' / 'outliner-*' patterns).

Main agent can manually verify the two 'NOT FULLY VERIFIED' items (Group-click-member-expands and Ungroup-removes-header) by clicking an outliner row after grouping and watching the Duplicate label; both rely on the same group-aware selectObject path which is in /app/frontend/src/lib/store.js.
critical_code_review_comments: ContextMenu.jsx snapshot pattern (useState initializer) is a clean and correct fix for the transient-clear race. Good defensive choice over subscribing to store.
ContextMenu.jsx restoreSelection() before every action is belt-and-suspenders but a useful safety net.
Viewport.jsx onPointerMissed now correctly ignores right-button (button===2 || which===3). Confirmed by Group action succeeding.
doFlatten single-atomic setState eliminates the prior addImportedMesh+filter race. Verified by final scene-count=1.

Minor: ContextMenu.jsx 'allInSameGroup' relies on selectedObjs[0].groupId being truthy — fine, but might surprise users when one of two selected items is grouped and the other isn't (button label still says 'Group selected'). Low priority.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% — 10/13 review cases fully verified, 3 cases partially verified due to wrong outliner-row selector in my script (NOT a product bug).

seed_data_creation: none — added/removed cubes & cylinders ephemerally in 7 scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: URL: <REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL>/workspace. The outliner row testid pattern was NOT 'object-row-*'. After grouping, the DOM exposes testids like 'group-group-<id>' (the group row) and 'group-toggle-group-<id>' (its expand/collapse chevron). To verify 'group-aware selectObject' and 'Ungroup removes header', enumerate testids that start with 'outliner-' or click directly on a Cube mesh in the 3D viewport (right of the build plate) and check that the Duplicate button label reads '(2)'. Reproducer for fixes: add 2 cubes -> Shift+drag full viewport -> right-click center -> click ctx-group-btn -> querySelector('[data-testid^="group-group-"]') is non-null. For flatten: file-new, add-cube-positive-btn, add-cylinder-negative-btn, Shift+drag full viewport, right-click center, click ctx-flatten-btn, wait 2s, scene-count reads '1 objs'.
rca of the issue: Previous iteration_4 RCA was correct: (a) Viewport.onPointerMissed cleared selection on right-click pointerup BEFORE menu action ran, leading groupSelected() to early-return for ids.length<2. Fixed by ignoring button===2 events. (b) doFlatten did addImportedMesh (which does its own set) and then a separate setState filter — the second call ran on a stale closure where the new mesh wasn't yet in objects, and depending on zustand batching the originals could survive. Fixed by collapsing to a single setState that simultaneously filters originals and appends the baked mesh. (c) Defense in depth: ContextMenu snapshots selection at mount via useState initializer, so even if the store transiently clears, menu items remain enabled and reducers receive the intended ids via restoreSelection().
